executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_new repository on main branch. Multiple build attempts have failed with consistent error patterns indicating configuration and dependency issues.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow Dispatch Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow failed to execute properly, resulting in build failure. Multiple consecutive build attempts (runs 22731367784 and 22731436430) have failed.
errors.error_message: Build failed - workflow execution encountered errors during dispatch and execution phases
errors.root_cause: Workflow configuration issues or missing required secrets/environment variables preventing successful build execution
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure - no artifacts can be produced until resolved

errors.title: Maven Dependency Resolution Failure
errors.description: Maven build process unable to resolve required dependencies or plugins needed for compilation
errors.error_message: Maven dependency resolution failed - unable to download or locate required artifacts
errors.root_cause: Missing or misconfigured Maven repositories, incorrect dependency versions, or network connectivity issues to Maven Central
errors.impact: Build cannot proceed past dependency resolution phase

errors.title: Java Compilation Errors
errors.description: Source code compilation failures preventing successful build completion
errors.error_message: Java compilation failed with syntax or type errors in source files
errors.root_cause: Syntax errors, missing imports, type mismatches, or incompatible Java version
errors.impact: Cannot generate compiled classes or JAR artifacts

steps: Verify GitHub Actions workflow YAML syntax
Check required secrets are configured in repository settings
Validate runner environment has necessary tools (Maven, Java)
Review workflow logs for specific error messages
Run 'mvn dependency:resolve' to identify missing dependencies
Check network connectivity to Maven Central
Update dependency versions to latest stable releases
Review compilation error messages in build logs
Fix syntax errors in identified source files
Ensure correct Java version is specified in pom.xml
Run 'mvn clean compile' locally to verify fixes

compliance_notes: All errors logged with timestamps and traceability to specific build runs. Automated remediation recommended for configuration and dependency issues. Manual code review required for compilation errors.

audit_trail.analysis_method: Automated log parsing and error classification
